validation.prompt: Ensure the dataframe only includes records where trip_status is not 'Trip Completed' and has the specified columns.
basis: New datafram is created with trip_status column filtered to exclude 'Trip Completed'
Selected columns should include but not limited to request_id, pickup_point, drop_point, driver_id, trip_status, payment_method, weather, request_day, request_hour, cancellation_reason
.columns on new dataframe matches the selected column list exactly

title: Pie chart of incomplete trip statuses

validation.prompt: Verify a pie chart is created showing distribution of trip_status for incomplete rides.
basis: Chart type is pie chart
Dataframe used is the new dataframe created where trip_status is not 'Trip Completed'
Uses trip_status column value counts
Chart title is 'Proportion of Incomplete Rides Trip Statuses'
Displays percentage values on chart
Color is assigned to the chart
Startangle is optional

validation.prompt: Validate the histogram that shows number of incomplete rides per day categorized by cancellation reason.
validation.chart_title: Incomplete Rides by Day and Reason
basis: Chart type is stacked histogram
Dataframe used is the new dataframe created where trip_status is not 'Trip Completed'
Hue is based on cancellation_reason
Histogram is binned into 7
X-axis represents request_day with label as 'Day'
Y-axis represents number of incomplete rides with label as 'Number of Incomplete Rides'
Chart title is 'Incomplete Rides by Day and Reason'

validation.prompt: Check if a histogram shows incomplete rides across hours of the day split by cancellation reason.
validation.chart_title: Incomplete Rides by Hour and Reason
basis: Chart type is stacked histogram
Dataframe used is the new dataframe created where trip_status is not 'Trip Completed'
Hue is based on cancellation_reason
Histogram is binned into 24
X-axis represents request_hour with label as 'Hour of the Day'
Y-axis represents number of incomplete rides with label as 'Number of Incomplete Rides'
Chart title is 'Incomplete Rides by hour and Reason'

title: Bar chart of weather vs cancellation

validation.prompt: Ensure a grouped bar chart is shown for count of cancellations per weather condition by reason.
validation.chart_title: Cancellations by Weather and Reason per Ride Type
basis: Data is grouped by weather and cancellation_reason
Dataframe used is the new dataframe created where trip_status is not 'Trip Completed'
Chart title is 'Cancellations by Weather and Reason per Ride Type'
Chart type is grouped bar chart using seaborn .barplot
X-axis represents weather conditions with label as 'Weather Conditions'
Y-axis shows count of cancellations with label as 'Count of Cancellations'
